---
title: "Build information"
---

This table is generated when the site builds on GitHub Actions, so each value reflects
the date of the most recent Publish run rather than a stored snapshot. A workflow step
writes the table with `date`, so the render stays free of executable code. The ISO
year-week field uses the same `YYYYwWW` form as the
[ZFS pool naming convention](decisions/20260611-zpool-naming-convention.md).

{{< include _build-info-table.md >}}
